theme_and_archetype.description: Earthy, authentic, trustworthy, international-grade professionalism. Rooted in Indian agriculture but projecting global competence.

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3. Highly expressive, elegant serif that conveys heritage and premium quality. Use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Body text, UI elements, buttons, and form inputs. Clean, legible, humanist sans.

overlines.style: uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs or text-sm, font-medium, Outfit.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#F6F4EB] border border-[#1A201C]/10 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#1A201C]/30
surface_strategies.textures: Add subtle SVG noise/grain overlays to large sections for tactile, earthy feel.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Asymmetry, High Visual Impact
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use The Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A: Tetris Grid) for visual sections, Mode B for functional lists.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-green text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-outfit font-medium hover:bg-brand-green/90 transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider text-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-brand-green text-brand-green px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-outfit font-medium hover:bg-brand-green/5 transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider text-sm

navigation.links: Outfit font, text-sm, tracking-wide, uppercase, hover:text-brand-terracotta transition-colors

footer.style: Dark background (brand-dark_section), pale text. Massive typography for brand name. Grid layout for contacts and links. Generous padding py-24.

forms.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-brand-dark/20 rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:border-brand-green focus:ring-0 outline-none font-outfit transition-colors
forms.integration: Use Web3Forms for the contact form.

badges.style: For licenses (APEDA, IEC, etc.), use elegant bordered cards with gold_accent accents and high-quality typography. If standard icons are used, style them sophisticatedly.

Home.Hero: Asymmetric layout. Left: Massive typography 'Harnessing Trade Opportunities with Precision.' Right: Tetris-style collage of 3 overlapping images (img_1, img_2, img_3) with subtle Framer Motion parallax. Background: primary cream + grain overlay.
Home.Value Pillars: Grid of 4 tall cards (img_16 to img_19) with a dark gradient overlay. Text at bottom: Clear Communication, Great Quality, Right Price, Timely Deliverance.
Home.Quick Services: Two massive interactive sections highlighting 'Fresh Produce' and 'Ingredients & Additives'. Large background images from the media set with hover zoom effect. High contrast serif headings.
Home.Tagline CTA: A full-width dark section (brand-green) declaring 'That's all we do!' with a stark, minimal button leading to Contact.

Services.Fresh Produce: Grid showcasing img_4 to img_9. Use Mode A Bento Grid (spans of 2 and 1) to break monotony. Earthy terracotta accents.
Services.Ingredients & Additives: Grid showcasing img_10 to img_15. Deep green accents.
Services.Layout Note: Avoid standard symmetrical 3-column grids. Vary image heights and widths.

Licenses & Memberships.Grid: A 2x2 or 4x1 grid of Shadcn Cards styled like premium certificates. Borders, subtle gold_accent lines, serif typography for the license names (APEDA, IEC, FIEO, Spices Board). Backgrounds: pure white or secondary cream.

Catalogues.Layout: A dense, functional layout (Mode B Control Room Grid).
Catalogues.List: Rows of downloadable PDF cards. Each card has a Phosphor Icon (FilePdf), title, and a 'Download' text button. Clean borders, hover translates up slightly (-translate-y-1). Points to dummy/placeholder /pdfs/ files in public folder.

Contacts.Left: Contact info: Address, Phone, Email, LinkedIn. Large typography, clear hierarchy. Use img_24 or img_25 as a faded atmospheric background behind text.
Contacts.Right: Web3Forms integration using customized Shadcn Form. Input fields should be minimal (bottom border only, no full boxes). Submit button uses primary button style.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React Router (BrowserRouter), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react), Shadcn UI (customize components entirely to match guidelines, strip Vercel look).
instructions_to_main_agent.parallel_execution: Execute component creation and page assembly in parallel where possible.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: MUST include data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) in kebab-case based on role.
instructions_to_main_agent.assets: DO NOT use external image URLs. EXCLUSIVELY use the local public paths provided in media_urls (e.g., /images/img_1.jpg). These represent the 28 provided photographs.
instructions_to_main_agent.design_rules: Strict adherence to the earthy organic color palette. NO purple/blue gradients. NO Inter/Roboto for headings. Use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body. Ensure ample padding (p-12 to p-24) on sections.
instructions_to_main_agent.contact_form: Ensure Web3Forms is implemented. Use a placeholder access key if none is provided, but wire the form correctly.
